headline: Argus Upgrades Nokia to Buy: Can AI Network Demand Wake Up the Sleeping Giant?
summary: Analysts at Argus see a compelling opportunity in Nokia (NYSE:NOK), upgrading the Finnish networking giant’s shares to Buy from Hold with a $15 price target. The call followed Nokia’s Q1 report and points to accelerating AI-driven demand in the Network Infrastructure business. The thesis frames Nokia stock as a potential AI infrastructure dark horse, with ... Argus Upgrades Nokia to Buy: Can AI Network Demand Wake Up the Sleeping Giant?
